projectDescription: A beautiful, animated HTML birthday greeting card page designed to celebrate someone special with heartfelt messages, floating balloons, and festive styling.
keyFeatures: Animated birthday card with CSS keyframe animations
Decorative wish list with hover effects
Responsive design for mobile and desktop
publicApiSurface: .card — central card container with fade-in animation
.balloon (b1–b4) — floating balloon elements with float animation
.birthday-list — decorated wish list with hover slide effect
